query:
-- First update districts for all listings based on address
UPDATE listings SET district = CASE
  WHEN address LIKE '%Заозёрная%' OR address LIKE '%Заозерная%' THEN 'Невский'
  WHEN address LIKE '%Софийская%' THEN 'Фрунзенский'
  WHEN address LIKE '%Пархоменко%' THEN 'Выборгский'
  WHEN address LIKE '%Васильевского острова%' OR address LIKE '%линия%' THEN 'Василеостровский'
  WHEN address LIKE '%Артиллерийская%' THEN 'Центральный'
  WHEN address LIKE '%Звенигородская%' THEN 'Адмиралтейский'
  WHEN address IS NULL THEN NULL
  ELSE district
END
WHERE id IN (18, 20, 28, 32, 49);

-- Now delete all listings not in Центральный (when district is known)
DELETE FROM listings 
WHERE district IS NOT NULL AND district != 'Центральный';

-- Also delete listings with null district (can't verify they're in the right area)
DELETE FROM listings 
WHERE district IS NULL;

-- Check what remains
SELECT id, platform, title, address, district FROM listings;
